mnemonics: Proof of Work is like solving a difficult puzzle to Prove you Worked hard to add the block. Proof of Stake is like putting your own money (a Stake) on the line to be chosen to add the block.
keyPoints: Consensus is the process by which all nodes in a decentralized network agree on the validity of transactions and the state of the ledger.
Proof of Work (PoW) requires miners to solve complex computational puzzles to validate transactions and create new blocks.
Proof of Stake (PoS) selects validators based on the amount of cryptocurrency they hold and are willing to 'stake' as collateral.
commonMistakes: Believing that 'decentralized' means there is no agreement process; consensus is the mechanism that enables decentralized agreement.
Confusing mining (PoW) with validating (PoS); they are different processes for achieving the same goal of securing the network.
